title: Music and Melody RP
description: Completely overhauls and reimagines the vanilla Minecraft soundtrack with a plethora of new, fitting and atmospheric music tracks that blend perfectly with vanilla. Formerly known as Legacies Music
body:
### This project has been superceeded by the new [Music and Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-and-melody) mod.

 _Don't worry, it's available for 1.21.1, 1.21.11, and every version at or above 26.1, on both Fabric & NeoForge!_

Music and Melody completely overhauls the vanilla soundtrack (without removing existing tracks) using the custom soundtrack created for the [Legacies and Legends](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacies-and-legends) mod and its modpack, Legacies. This resource pack exists to provide more players and vanilla clients a lighter way of experiencing the amazing pieces used in the mod.

[Click here to view the complete Legacies OST as a youtube playlist!](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEvR1_oznfRTQhU5kal0oYrIuSmiEb_ay)

All music rights go to the songs' respective artists. Do not use them without first checking if you are permitted to do so. If you are a composer and would like your tracks removed, please contact me through Discord (linked up the top)

Also available for [Bedrock Edition](https://mcpedl.com/music-and-melody/)

*This unique soundtrack expansion was made as a part of **[Legacies](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacies)***

[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

[![Music and Melody - Minecraft Storage Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/786029bbbe325fc2d56a2bca5d74c883521356d0_0.webp)](https://minecraftstorage.com/textures/music-and-melody)

### Credits

Credits can be found on the main mod page [linked here](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacies-and-legends)
